bastion-shield.name: Bastion Shield
bastion-shield.description: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, if the attacking model is within 12", worsen the AP of that attack by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, if the attacking model is within 18", worsen the AP by 1 instead.

quake-multigenerator.name: Quake Multigenerator
quake-multigenerator.description: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding TITANIC) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

ironskein.name: Ironskein
ironskein.description: Add +2 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

high-kahl.name: High Kâhl
high-kahl.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

oathbound-speculator.name: Oathbound Speculator
oathbound-speculator.description:
Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can spend 3YP. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

dead-reckoning.name: Dead Reckoning
dead-reckoning.description: At the end of the turn, if the bearer is on the battlefield and you spent no YP in that turn, you can gain 1YP.

iron-ambassador.name: Iron Ambassador
iron-ambassador.restriction: LEAGUES OF VOTANN model with Autoch-pattern combi-bolter only
iron-ambassador.description: Once per battle, when the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend up to 3YP and, until the end of the phase, add the number of YP you just spent to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's ranged weapons.

ancestral-crest.name: Ancestral Crest
ancestral-crest.description: Once per turn, when you target the bearer's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, spend 1YP and reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
